overall.description: A maritime simulation game depicting a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through rough, stormy seas at dusk. The vessel features operational navigation displays including radar and chart plotters, while the bow cuts through choppy waters beneath dark, overcast skies.

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel forward through rough seas while monitoring the radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: navigation display showing coastal chart with depth contours and landmasses
circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing nearby contacts
digital display showing depth and vessel status information
red-painted bow deck of the vessel with railing and anchor equipment
white metal safety railing at the front of the bridge
choppy dark water with whitecaps indicating rough sea conditions
dark gray overcast sky covering the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady first-person view from a ship's bridge, looking out over the bow as the vessel navigates through rough, stormy waters. The three navigation monitors display chart, radar, and depth data while the ship maintains forward momentum through choppy seas beneath an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the vessel forward through increasingly rough seas while monitoring navigation systems

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its steady progression through rough seas as dusk settles into darker conditions. A bright lightning flash suddenly illuminates the storm clouds on the left horizon, briefly lighting up the turbulent water surface while the navigation monitors continue their steady operation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as a stormy dusk gradually deepens into a darker, more volatile atmosphere. It begins with a view over the bow, where the vessel cuts through rough, choppy waters while three navigation monitors display active chart, radar, and depth data. As the ship maintains its forward momentum, the overcast sky grows heavier and the surrounding light fades into a deeper twilight. The scene then shifts abruptly when a bright flash of lightning illuminates the storm clouds on the left horizon, momentarily casting a sharp light across the turbulent water surface. This sudden burst of electricity briefly clarifies the chaos of the sea before the environment settles back into the dim glow of the operational bridge displays.
